entry.title: Deep Rock Galactic v0.18.3
entry.content:
**Changes (Compatible with previous 0.18 Versions)**
- Added Better Filler Items - Fixed Various in game UI syncs - Small bugfixes
**INFO FILES** [INSTRUCTIONS](https://docs.google.com/document/d/16At-2kS_azJRf9PdUcZeA8Esfoh6kNm2dWVWy8u8wA0/edit?usp=sharing) [MOD on MOD.IO](https://mod.io/g/drg/m/test-archipelago-integration#description) [SIDELOADER for DRG Mods](https://github.com/trumank/mint)

entry.title: Pokemon Crystal v5.4.4
entry.content:
# Changelog
Since [5.4.3](https://github.com/gerbiljames/Archipelago-Crystal/releases/tag/5.4.3)
## Bug Fixes - Fix Universal Tracker not working for seeds generated before 5.4.3
_This release is backwards compatible with seeds generated on 5.4.0 or later. Some fixes are retroactive, re-patch your ROM to benefit from them._

entry.title: Resident Evil 7 v0.3.4
entry.content: Fixed 2 locations error's that could happen. (The Kitchen from the Shipwreck being though being in the same place as the Kitchen from Chapter 2) and an logic error in the Old House.

entry.title: Pharcryption v1.1.0
entry.content: This is a fork of the original apworld by ThePhar. This APWorld got modernized and got improved a bit (more reliable). As usual, these are to tie us over until ThePhar gets back to this. I am not going to be a full time maintainer.

entry.title: Brotato v0.14.1
entry.content:
This is a GUI update to present additional information to the player and clean up a few graphical oddities caused by the mod.
## Added
- The "Connect" menu has been renamed to the "AP" menu and additional information has been added to it. - The Progress panel previously shown on the character select screen has been moved here. - A new Slot Data panel now shows the slot data when connected. - A new Options panel has been added for mod-specific configuration. - Deathlink can now be set from the Options page to one of three modes: - Use the value set in the slot data/player options. - Force Deathlink on. - Force Deathlink off. - Added a section to the Options panel to help with bug reporting: - Instructions on the best way to report feedback (in the Archipelago Discord). - A button to open the log file's location. - This is especially relevant now that Brotato has cross-platform builds. - A button to open the Brotato game development channel on the Archipelago Discord.
## Changed
- Disable the address, olayer, and password edit boxes in the connect UI when connecting/connected to an AP server.
## Fixed
- Fixed the main menu not initializing properly when the Archipelago mod was enabled. - Fixed the character select screen constantly changing size when mousing over characters. - Unfortunately, the fix for this was to remove the Progress panel from the UI. The base game's UI is wider now due to the animated character portraits, and there's not enough horizontal space for the AP data. I may add this back in at some point if I think of a better way to handle it.

entry.title: The Legend of Zelda - Oracle of Seasons v20.1.13
entry.content: ## ⏫ New sprite loader - A new sprite editor is added as a component on the Archipelago launcher - Editing the sprite will have to be done in a specialized software, with the tool giving a link sprite in different colors it can be played with. Keep in mind link's color are as varied as they possibly could be, it is impossible to have for example green and red on the same sprite, or use a different color - Once ready, the sprite editor can select it as default under the selected colors for either Seasons or Ages

entry.title: Deltarune v1.2.2
entry.content:
**Only Chapter 1 and 2 are available for now**
(This APWorld is intended for DELTARUNE 1.04. Using a Beta or the Ch1+2 Demo will not work.)
**>>> This is an unstable pre-release. For asyncs/syncs, we recommend using version v1.2.1 instead. <<<**
Changelog:
- In-game client - Probably other things i forgot - Egg, moss, shadowcrystal are now filler - Added an option to include unused items to itempool (can exclude Everybodyweapon) - [CH3] Lost Pippins, Zapper, Watercooler, Shuttah and shadowguy are now in logic only in tv world if you are playing all routes (so you can recruit them before losing them without the need to reload save. They are marked out of logic on UT if you want to reload your save) - Begin of porting game mod to a patching framework to making it open source, only chapter 1 and chapter select are currently done - Now display location item name reward in game and in shops (some places may be missing) - [CH1] BakeSale save point have been moved to be before the story blocker - [CH1] Leaving Man's room now go to the same room before entering - [CH1] Re-did Castle Key NPC blocker - [CH1] Added some easter eggs to Kris Room (Thanks @Charaster-Official for the Archipelago trophy and keucher-mod for the flags) - [CH1] Weapons storage is now up to 48 - [CH1] Armor storage is now up to 60 - [CH2] Moved back to castle town to be closer to a warp - [CH2] Add new savepoints

entry.title: Factorio Bob's v2.2.1
entry.content: Fixes mod crashing with random recipe times

entry.title: Cuphead v0.2.16908799
entry.content:
**To see notes and what's new for alpha03, see [alpha03a](https://github.com/JKLeckr/Archipelago-cuphead/releases/tag/alpha03a)**
### Revision
This revision overhauls weapon setup in the item pool, which fixes several issues with weapons not being correctly in the item pool. This revision also fixes some issues with level_placements.

entry.title: Castlevania: Portrait of Ruin v1.0.0
entry.content:
# Castlevania: Portrait of Ruin Archipelago Version 1.0 # * Initial Release ## Base Game Changes ## - Fixed the bug where skipping Death's cutscene softlocks you - Pre-game logos are skipped - Items and skills over 9 can be picked up - The drawbridge is always lowered - You start with and have infinite use Magical Tickets that can be used to warp to the shop. - The Forest of Doom portrait requires you to have Stella's Locket instead of showing it to Wind - The MP Max up check in Forest of Doom now has a unique flag and can be collected properly - Removed duplicate shoes in Sandy Grave - Patched the glitch menu memory corruption bug - Patched the suspend glitch - The passage leading to the Nest of Evil now checks X portraits clear instead of some quest flag - Added a platform below the elevator room check
## Known Issues ## * Receiving numerous items may cause a glitchy popup to stay on screen. I have been unable to replicate this, please let me know if you have any information

entry.title: Castlevania: Portrait of Ruin v1.0.1
entry.content: # Castlevania: Portrait of Ruin Archipelago Version 1.0.1 # ## New Settings ## N/A ## Changes ## * Defeating Astarte after getting hit with Temptation now switches you back to Jonathan if you didn't have Change Cube * The Knife in the shop has been replaced with a Claymore (for breaking walls) * Charlotte will be dismissed after the cutscene in City of Haze unless you have Call Cube * Changed Headguard to Head Guard ## Fixes ## * Fixed the items in the Dark Academy west building not being properly placed * Fixed spell logic expecting you to have Call instead of Skill * Fixed Tower of Death connecting to the top of the tower without highjump * Fixed corruption that happens when you get an item while having 9 of that item * You can no longer sell Magical Tickets ## Known Issues ## * None so Far

entry.title: Okami HD v0.3.4
entry.content:
# Okami HD APWorld 0.3.4
## What's Changed * Remap Kamiki chests ids, move west Islands to regular Kamiki, rename … by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/24 * Ensure that Kamiki merchant is open before making its random items avilable in logic by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/25 * Set not implemented options to false by default/ remove additional divine instrument precollected by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/27 * Fix/shinshu valley checks issues by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/29
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/compare/0.3.3...0.3.4

entry.title: plateup v0.2.6.3
entry.content:
## What's New? - Added `random_research` — research desk randomisation can now be enabled from the YAML. This is off by default - Added progressive day leases — when enabled, the first Day Lease for each food is required from Day 1, effectively making it act like a food unlock and helping prevent players from being locked out of foods after franchising - Day and franchise logic now has softer progression gates. A day block can now be considered in logic if you have any of the following: - enough relevant Day Leases - any speed upgrade - at least 3 named appliance unlocks, when appliance unlocks are enabled - Dish-day and franchise-day gates now both use the new block logic - "Lose a Run" is now excluded from progression placement for both franchise and complete-days goals, keeping it filler-only - Added slot data support for `random_research` and `day_leases_progressive` so the client can correctly receive both settings
## New YAML Options
**`random_research`** — Enables random research mode. When enabled, the research desk randomly researches into any appliance in the pool instead of following the fixed progression path. When disabled, the research desk works as in vanilla. Defaults to `false`.
```yaml random_research: # Enable random research mode. # When enabled, the research desk randomly researches into any appliance in the pool instead of the fixed progression path. # When disabled, the research desk works as in vanilla. 'false': 50 'true': 0 ```
**day_leases_progressive** — Makes day leases act as progressive items. When enabled, the first lease for each food or dish is required to play even Day 1. This makes the first lease act as an unlock, helping prevent players from starting a food freely and then becoming gated mid-run after franchising elsewhere. Only relevant when **day_leases_enabled** is on. Defaults to **false**.
```yaml day_leases_progressive: # Make day leases act as progressive items: the first lease for each food/dish is required to play even Day 1. # When enabled, leases_required = ceil(day / interval) — every day block requires at least one lease, so the # first lease acts as an unlock, preventing players from starting a food freely and then being gated mid-run. # When disabled (default), the first block of days (1 to interval) is free, and leases gate subsequent blocks. # This can help prevent players from being locked out of foods after franchising elsewhere. # Only relevant when day_leases_enabled is on. 'false': 50 'true': 0 ```
## Logic Changes
Day blocks now have more flexible access rules. Instead of only checking for the required number of leases, a block may be in logic if the player has one of several forms of progression:
- enough Day Leases for that block - any speed upgrade - enough named appliance unlocks, capped at min(3, day_lease_interval)
This should make progression feel less brittle, especially when appliance unlocks are enabled or when players receive useful speed upgrades early.
[Mod Update 0.2.6.3](https://github.com/CazIsABoi/PlateUpAPMod/releases/tag/0.2.6.3)

entry.title: Minecraft Fabric v1.1.1
entry.content: - Fixed Oversight with Healing Pretty Good Advancements that made the mod not work in syncs - Fixed Cogs still being craftable when Cogwheels are locked (Create Mod) - Updated Logic for Red Sand Items when Create is present - Music Disc Heartstep (Healing Pretty Good) is now excluded with other music discs - Relocked a debug command that was accidentally left enabled - Fishing Rod Recipes now also locks carrot on a stick and warped fungus on a stick - Fixed Logic Error for Netherite Block - Added TNT recipes as a progression item - All Netherite Items now require TNT to be considered in Logic - Added two new progression Items for Create: - Sand Paper Recipes - Blaze Burners - Added two new junk items for Minecraft: - Copper Ore Vein - Large Copper Ore Vein - The following blocks now can’t be broken without their proper check: - Brewing Stand - Grindstone - Stonecutter - Loom - Cartography Table - Smithing Table - Beds - Respawn Anchor - Anvil - Enchanting Table - Added additional Itemsanity Exclusion Options for the following: - Flowers - Slabs - Stairs - Walls / Fences / Fence Gates

entry.title: Minecraft Fabric v1.1.1.1
entry.content:
# Minecraft Fabric (1.1.1.1)
Mod Link: https://modrinth.com/mod/archipelago-mod AP World Link: https://github.com/Deadlydiamond98/MinecraftFabricAPWorld/releases Wiki: https://modded.wiki/w/Fabric_Archipelago_Mod
Changelog: Minecraft
- Fixed error with yaml options where Flowers and Rare Ores were merged on template - Fixed Logic Error with Carved Pumpkin being in sphere 1 - "You've Got a Friend in Me" is now considered an exploration advancement - Scaffolding, Spore Blossom, Leads, and Drip Leaf are now Exploration Items - Updated Logic for Netherite Mining to account for beds
Create
- Scoria now no longer requires Nether Access to be considered in Logic - Updated Logic for Scorchia to require either Nether Access or Black Dye - Decorative Deepslate Blocks from the Create mod now require smelting to be considered in logic - Red Sandpaper is no longer considered an Exploration Item (as Create has ways to obtain it without finding a Mesa)

entry.title: Scooby-Doo! Night of 100 Frights v1
entry.content:
# QOL Fix Release
- Fixes some logic issues in Cellar 4 for both entry from Cellar 3 and for the High Up Snackbox in snacksanity not requiring Springs

entry.title: Borderlands 2 v76
entry.content:
Want to test on the frontlines? Get the latest developments here. Higher likelihood of showstopping issues. Good luck out there, Slab!
setup instructions on the home page and [readme](https://github.com/EdricY/Bouncy-Loot-God/blob/main/README.md)
[sample yamls](https://github.com/EdricY/Bouncy-Loot-God/tree/main/sample-yamls)
new stuff (since 0.5.2): * reorder headhunters for progressive order * new oasis ramp * option to remove locations: story quests or side quests * option to remove easily missable locations * 30% Omnd-Omnd-Ohk spawn rate in hunters grotto and scyllas grove * get talon of god check to send * allow selection of multiple goals * BAR Challenge checks toggleable by type (region-based or general) * include_locations option * in-game option to disable loot collision * assassinate the assassins always repeatable (easier to do Compl33tionist) * spawn more enemies in windshear waste (easier to do a bunch of combat challenges) * gear items/locations renamed: `VeryRare SMG` -> `License: VeryRare SMG` and `VeryRare SMG Found` * avoid lag spike when loading spawn trap * "blocked" quests reappear at the Sanctuary or Southern Shelf bounty boards

entry.title: Factorio: Space Age v2.2.0
entry.content:
# Factorio: Space Age apworld 2.2.0
* The `pentapod_killers` option `"land mine"` is renamed and enhanced to `"land mine and construction robot"`. The old name is still accepted as an alias. Thanks `@super_sebby` for suggesting this on discord. * The `pentapod_killers` and `demolisher_killers` options now accept partial specification. Missing keys fallback to their default values. * Swapped `automation-3` earlier and `quantum-processor` later in the `progressive-circuit` chain. Thanks @ObsoleteDesign for suggesting this in [#24](https://github.com/thejoshwolfe/Archipelago/issues/24). * Added `artillery` to the end of the `progressive-vulcanus` chain as a non-essential padding tech. Thanks @ObsoleteDesign for suggesting this in [#24](https://github.com/thejoshwolfe/Archipelago/issues/24). * Fixed `progressive-portable-power` giving the fission and fusion equipment in the wrong order. Thanks @ObsoleteDesign for reporting this in [#23](https://github.com/thejoshwolfe/Archipelago/issues/23). * Fixed the empty `bioflux-processing` tech appearing in the `progressive-gleba` chain when starting on Gleba. [#20](https://github.com/thejoshwolfe/Archipelago/issues/20) * Fixed goals `aquilo_orbit_10_science` and `solar_system_edge_11_science` unlocking their final technology too early. [#25](https://github.com/thejoshwolfe/Archipelago/issues/25) * Teleport Trap has been removed due to bugs. See [#18](https://github.com/thejoshwolfe/Archipelago/issues/18) if you'd like to contribute a fix so that it can be re-enabled. The `teleport_trap_weight` option now does nothing and is documented as deprecated.
download: https://github.com/thejoshwolfe/Archipelago/releases . general docs: https://github.com/thejoshwolfe/Archipelago/blob/space-age/worlds/factorio_space_age/docs/en_Factorio_Space_Age.md . setup guide: https://github.com/thejoshwolfe/Archipelago/blob/space-age/worlds/factorio_space_age/docs/setup_en.md . source code: https://github.com/thejoshwolfe/Archipelago/tree/space-age/worlds/factorio_space_age .

entry.title: The Simpsons Hit And Run v0.5.3b0
entry.content: Fixed hidden determinism and goal requirements

entry.title: The Grinch v1.5.3
entry.content:
## Bugfixes
With errors regarding UT `.value` fixed, the Grinch will no longer be mixed. It was a finding that made the Grinch somewhat unimpressed to see, with the fix finally free, he is now filled with glee.

entry.title: Manual_BlockTales_WolfBoi008 v5.0.0.post2
entry.content:
# Known Issues None for now... # Changelog - Added a few new Chatsanity and Cutscenesanity Checks. - Removed a lot of Chatsanity Checks, primarily within the Pre-Prologue. - Why were like 20+ NPCs nuked from Pre-Prologue??? - Moved the Loyal Knight to the Roadtown Region since they now appear there first. - A few more Checks related to other Options were added.
I think that's all I did in this pre-release...

entry.title: CrossCode v0.8.4
entry.content:
## Changes to Mod
* Correctly reference internal buffer of checks to send on reconnection (@CodeTriangle, #56). * Resend chests that are open upon reconnection to the server (@CodeTriangle, #56).
## Changes to Generation
* Add Mine Detector to the pool and make it required to complete **Digging Up the Past** (@CodeTriangle, #57). * Added the option **Circuit Overrides**, adds a number of **Circuit Override** items to the pool (@CodeTriangle, CodeTriangle/Archipelago#17)
## Fixes to Logic
* **Calzone Shop** is now considered in logic after acquiring **Pond Slums Pass** (@buanjautista, #60). * Fix an issue where the final boss room of **Grand Krys'kajo** erroneously expected two **Krys'kajo Key** items (@CodeTriangle, #58).

entry.title: CrossCode v0.9.0rc2
entry.content:
## Note
This release includes everything changed in release 0.8.4 (@CodeTriangle, @buanjautista).
## Fixes to Logic
* Changed the region where **Vivid Puff Plants** are found to East Gaia (@CodeTriangle, #59). * Fixed an issue where, regardless of the value set by **Botanics Completion Amount**, logic would still assume that 77 plants were required for botanics completion (@CodeTriangle, CodeTriangle/Archipelago#18).

entry.title: The Legend of Zelda - Phantom Hourglass v0.9.2a0
entry.content:
Compatible with seeds generated in v9.0+ [Setup Guide](https://github.com/carrotinator/Archipelago/blob/main/worlds/tloz_ph/docs/setup.md)
- Fixed improper behavior for models used for more than one item, including - Cyclone Slate and Frogs - Cannon and Ships - Spirit gems and Spirits - Added missing stage flag to Uncharted island - Fixed warp to start sometimes triggering from opening the collection screen without flipping - Fixed some locations not resetting properly: - Miniblin ambush - Blaaz and Cyclok rewards - Man of Smiles prize postcard - Prevented crash from reloading client in rooms with spikes lowered by crystals - Prevented TotOK B8 switch from despawning - Getting a texboxless item in the SE Sea chart room no longer locks you in - Entrance plando no longer has a chance to disconnect the wrong entrances when there are several in the same region - Fixed goron chu location giving bonus treasure map - Fixed logic bugs in ToI - Added long bridge cave chest with sword beams to logic - Made swordfish shadows spawn immediately (instead of after ~25 seconds) if the rng roll to spawn them is successful, it feels like a 1/5 lol - Saving and quitting in Gleeoks room is safe again, and wind temple no longer respawns you in ice temple - Added Brant's maze exit entrance to IotD map on crown staircase when crown staircase isn't randomized

entry.title: The Simpsons Hit And Run v0.5.4b0
entry.content: Fixed generation with in game hints enabled (still don't work properly in game)

entry.title: Okami HD v0.4.0
entry.content:
# Okami HD APWorld 0.4.0
## What's Changed * Complete agata forest checks ids by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/30 * Move Shinshu Merchant to healed Shinshu File by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/36 * update IDs for client v0.8.0+ by @Axertin in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/37 * Refactor checkIds functions to use Enums by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/39 * Replace chests placehoders ids by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/41
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/compare/0.3.4...0.4.0

entry.title: Factorio - Space Age Without Space v0.8.6
entry.content: ## 0.8.6 Minor bug fixes, and Universal Tracker support.

entry.title: Portal 2 v0.7.0
entry.content:
## Additions See the [mod page](https://github.com/GlassToadstool/Portal2ArchipelagoMod/releases/tag/0.7.0) for additions.
## Note You must use the latest (v0.7.0) version of the [Portal 2 Archipelago Mod](https://github.com/GlassToadstool/Portal2ArchipelagoMod/releases/tag/0.7.0) with this version of the apworld.

entry.title: ANIMAL WELL v0.5.4
entry.content:
First update after a long time. It's got the manifest file in it now, and a bunch of various bug fixes.
This is marked as pre-release because I haven't tested it. If you test it and find that you're not having issues, please let us know in the Discord so I can get this marked as not a pre-release.
## What's Changed * fix bobcat connector + more dazzle egg tricks by @Rooby-Roo in https://github.com/ScipioWright/Archipelago-SW/pull/89 * Discord Logic Updates as of 7/31/25 by @Rooby-Roo in https://github.com/ScipioWright/Archipelago-SW/pull/92 * Connection from truth egg spot to top of well via long bubble by @ScipioWright in https://github.com/ScipioWright/Archipelago-SW/pull/93 * berry above frog kangaroo now accessible from lower by @Rooby-Roo in https://github.com/ScipioWright/Archipelago-SW/pull/94 * Fix two logic issues from the Discord pins by @Rooby-Roo in https://github.com/ScipioWright/Archipelago-SW/pull/96
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ScipioWright/Archipelago-SW/compare/0.5.3...0.5.4

entry.title: Manual_BlockTales_WolfBoi008 v5.0.0.post3
entry.content:
# Known Issues None for now... # Changelog - Removed the Chatsanity Checks for the Snowmen in Roadtown. - They don't really directly talk to you, so it didn't feel necessary. - Added a Chatsanity Check for one of the Cottage Doors in Roadtown, since one of the people there speak to you from behind the door. - Removed some other Chatsanity Checks in the Blackrock Mountains and Blackrock Castle areas that no longer exist. - Added and removed some more various Chatsanity and Cutscenesanity Checks. - Added a new Option: Optional Bosses. - Currently, the Cruel King DX and Supreme Mosquito content are the only things toggled by this Option. - Adding to this, Cruel King DX's fight logically expects you to be able to finish Chapter 3. **This is not the final logic**, it's only temporary due to Chapters 4 and 5 not being implemented into the Manual yet.
My current point in progress is the **beginning of Chapter 2**, so Prologue and Chapter 1 Goals should reflect the new changes in Demo 5. Anything past that will have changes that have not yet been reflected in the Manual quite yet.

entry.title: Factorio: Space Age v2.2.1
entry.content:
# Factorio: Space Age apworld 2.2.1
* Fix crash when your slot names contains a space. Thanks `@Silasary` for reporting this on Discord.
download: https://github.com/thejoshwolfe/Archipelago/releases . general docs: https://github.com/thejoshwolfe/Archipelago/blob/space-age/worlds/factorio_space_age/docs/en_Factorio_Space_Age.md . setup guide: https://github.com/thejoshwolfe/Archipelago/blob/space-age/worlds/factorio_space_age/docs/setup_en.md . source code: https://github.com/thejoshwolfe/Archipelago/tree/space-age/worlds/factorio_space_age .

entry.title: Factorio Bob's v2.2.2
entry.content: Fixed crash that occurred when trying to load the Icon for unknown useful items (basically useful items from any other game in a MW) Some spelling fixes and optimizations as well Issues caused, found and fixed by @Enderdraak (CosmicWolf)

entry.title: Rabi-Ribi v1.4.7
entry.content:
## Quick Links - [Game Info Page](https://github.com/tdkollins/Archipelago-Rabi-Ribi/blob/main/worlds/rabi_ribi/docs/en_Rabi-Ribi.md) - [Setup Guide](https://github.com/tdkollins/Archipelago-Rabi-Ribi/blob/main/worlds/rabi_ribi/docs/setup_beta_en.md) - [Known Issues](https://github.com/tdkollins/Archipelago-Rabi-Ribi/issues?q=is%3Aissue%20state%3Aopen%20label%3Abug)
## Before Playing This randomizer assumes the player is aware of hidden techniques that allow the game to be beaten without items, even at the lowest settings. It is HIGHLY recommended to play through the Basic section of the [Platforming Tricks Tutorial](https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=1706422414) before starting your first seed!
Additionally, the logic assumes that the player knows of hidden paths throughout the game, revealed with Ribbon, Fire Orb, or Carrot Bombs. A patch is available to expose these paths, alongside other useful features! It can be enabled by setting "Apply Beginner Mod" to `true`.
## What's Changed * Fix location sending for areas with items next to each other by @dclaganiere in https://github.com/tdkollins/Archipelago-Rabi-Ribi/pull/84 * Remove redundant version constant by @dclaganiere in https://github.com/tdkollins/Archipelago-Rabi-Ribi/pull/85
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tdkollins/Archipelago-Rabi-Ribi/compare/1.4.6...1.4.7

entry.title: Pizza Tower v1.3.1
entry.content:
# Pizza Tower Archipelago v1.3.1 [Setup](https://github.com/unsafetyskizzers/Archipelago/blob/pizza_ap/worlds/pizza_tower/docs/setup_en.md) | [Mod Page](https://gamebanana.com/mods/598236)
Small patch mostly for some issues missed in 1.3.0, as well as a couple of other minor changes
Changes: - Added the Camembert Squire to the enemy rando pool - Floor 1 Snotty now sleeps on the couch - Add Snotty exitfollowers for each floor
Fixes: - Fixed an issue where upon reconnecting there would be multiple instances of the baddie rando active at once - Fixed an issue where the combo timer would still work in Tricky Treat - Fixed the John Ghost sound continuing to play when it shouldn't - Fixed Pizzaface toppin requirement being skipped when it shouldn't - Fixed UT not being able to correctly tell the toppin requirements for bosses - Adjusted rules for Bee Nice

entry.title: Scooby-Doo! Night of 100 Frights v1
entry.content:
# QOL Fix Release
- Fixes some logic issues in Clamor 1 where the snacks behind the bookcase would not use the proper logic when not playing with keysanity on

entry.title: Path of Exile v2.0.0
entry.content:
## The built in python client is now deprecated. # Use the client here: https://github.com/stubobis1/Path-of-Exile-Archipelago-Client/releases/tag/2.0.0
### New Feature: Area Locations - New option **Area visits as location checks** (`add_area_locations_to_location_pool`, default: on) — reaching zones counts as location checks - 612 area entries added; towns/encampments skipped - Area location IDs start at 42000 to avoid conflicts with base-item, level, and boss ID ranges - Only areas in acts ≤ goal act are included - `existing_char` preset has area locations disabled by default
### Client - Electron frontend extracted to separate repository: [Path-of-Exile-Archipelago-Client](https://github.com/stubob/Path-of-Exile-Archipelago-Client) - Added as git submodule alongside `pathofexile_ap` - Fixed Linux
### Internal - `total_gear_upgrades` added to slot data - `areaLocationsAsLocations` flag added to slot data - `scrape_act_areas.py` added (scraper used to generate area location data)

entry.title: Plants vs. Zombies: Replanted v1.7.2
entry.content:
- Fixed a bug where wave locations in Survival and Last Stand wouldn't send. - Fixed a bug where "Progressive Twiddydinkies" items dropped by zombies would appear larger than intended. - Fixed inaccuracies with Universal Tracker. (hopefully fr this time)
For instructions, see the [Setup Guide.](https://github.com/dannybonz/replanted_archipelago/blob/main/apworld/docs/setup.md)

entry.title: Burnout 3 v0.1.0
entry.content:
## Fixes - Races should now display correctly when returning from an event.
## Known Issue - In Race Mode (and probably All Mode) the starting car can rarely be replaced by a filler item (Bonus Point), game should still be beatable. - The game will not generate if you select too few events when solo playing. - When disconnected from the AP World the values from the garage menu are incorrect
## New Features - You can see some AP Data on the garage menu ⚠️ WARNING The pnach file is required for this feature to work
## New Options - Deathlink is now possible ⚠️ WARNING The pnach file is required for this feature to work
## Game Version - You need a PS2 Burnout 3 US ISO (`SLUS-21050`).

entry.title: Brave Fencer Musashi v0.5.1
entry.content:
Added: -BP sanity -fixes for Open World cutscenes
Note: -Not compatible with XDelta Patches, must run unmodified game -not compatible with prior apworld generations -map tracker with Universal Tracker https://github.com/FarisTheAncient/Archipelago/releases/tag/Tracker_v0.2.30 -setup guide:https://github.com/AegeusEvander/Brave-Fencer-Musashi-AP-World/blob/main/docs/setup_en.md -Follow development and report bugs on the Archipelago gg Discord, -> Future-game-design -> Brave Fencer Musashi

entry.title: Dicey Dungeons v0.3.1b0
entry.content:
Changes from previous release:
- "#" now replaced by a star in game, as it was causing generation issues.
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Fylcoast/AP_diceydungeons/compare/v0.3.0-beta...v0.3.1-beta

entry.title: Manual_BlockTales_WolfBoi008 v5.0.0.post4
entry.content:
# Known Issues None for now... # Changelog - Added a Check for the Feel Fine Kyoko gives you. Talk to her twice to receive it. - Chapter 2 has been updated, so it's Chatsanity and Cutscenesanity should now be up-to-date.
With this update done, all that's left is updating Chapter 3 and anything related to it. Once that's done, Chapter 4 implementation can FINALLY begin, after being put on hold for the better part of a year.

entry.title: YARG v0.0.15
entry.content:
# Use Client Version 0.0.5+. No Client Update Required!
New: - Support for the Creative Commons Hero Setlist
## What's Changed * Added Creative Commons Hero Setlist by @energymaster22 in https://github.com/energymaster22/YARGArchipelago/pull/33
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/energymaster22/YARGArchipelago/compare/0.0.14...0.0.15

entry.title: YARGAllSetlists v26.5.4
entry.content:
# All Setlists - updated to 1.5 - Added YARG Official Setlist wave 15 (not its own setlist. Included in YARG Official Setlist) - Added Creative Commons Hero (port) - Added Guitar Hero 2 - Added GH2 360 Exclusives - Added GH2 Co-op - Added Rock Band 2
# Guitar Hero 2 - Initial Release It is highly recommended that you read the primary Github readme for the additional notes on setting up this game.
Supports Guitar, Bass, and Rhythm
Included setlists - Guitar Hero 2 - GH2 360 Exclusives - GH2 Co-op
# Rock Band 2 - Initial Release Supports Guitar, Bass, Drums, and Vocals
Included setlists - Rock Band 2
### Guitar Hero 1 - no change ### Guitar Hero World Tour - no change ### Rock Band 3 - no change ### LEGO Rock Band - no change

entry.title: Sly Cooper and the Thievius Raccoonus v0.3.4a0
entry.content:
Various bugfixes and other QoL content, much of it courtesy of @amondovagyok.
- The Sly 1 Client now has a proper title, as well as in-built Universal Tracker support. - Reduced frequency of various read-write operations, to hopefully address various crashes. - Added a new option to host.yaml, "Auto Fill Locations". Enabled by default. - When enabled, if a Sly 1 player has more items than locations, the apworld will create bonus "Cache" locations when collecting Keys to address this. This will prevent errors caused by excessive items. - If disabled, generation will give an OptionsError. - Added a manifest file for compatibility with Archipelago 0.7.0 and onward.
